violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
A splashguard is needed at the prep sink in the preparation area between 3 bay and prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Ambient temperature of the low boy refrigerator unit was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

The establishment is lacking a food preparation sink. Due to volume of food preparation conducted in the establishment the establishment is to have a food preparation sink installed. PIC and inspector discussed location where sink could be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The door to the employee's toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The coving in the basement area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The floors in the preparation unit are in poor repair, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
